ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical trial */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinical trial */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the clinical trial */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the clinical trial */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the trial (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "phase" TEXT /* Phase of the clinical trial (e.g., Phase I, Phase II) */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial sponsor */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of study (e.g., pharmacokinetics, efficacy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial for which the sample was collected */,
  "sample_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the sample */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was collected */,
  "time_post_dose" REAL /* Time in hours after the dose was administered */,
  "scheduled_sampling_time" TEXT /* Scheduled time for sample collection (24-hour format) */,
  "actual_sampling_time" TEXT /* Actual time when the sample was collected (24-hour format) */,
  "collected_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who collected the sample */,
  "checked_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who checked the sample */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any comments related to the sample collection */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample collected (e.g., blood, urine) */,
  "sample_status" TEXT /* Status of the sample (e.g., pending, processed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_checked_by FOREIGN KEY ("checked_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_collected_by FOREIGN KEY ("collected_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the trial (e.g., researcher, nurse, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sampling_schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial for which the schedule is set */,
  "scheduled_time" TEXT /* Scheduled time for sampling (24-hour format) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of sampling (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the sampling period in hours */,
  "sampling_interval" REAL /* Interval between sampling times */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sampling_schedule_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample the comment is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the comment was added */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., sample, trial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial result */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial for which the result is reported */,
  "result_data" TEXT /* Details of the result obtained */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the result was reported */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of result (e.g., interim, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_results_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample related to the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was performed */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Details of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., reminder, alert) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, nurse, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial related to the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "date_generated" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., interim, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_reports_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_head" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_department" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sampling_deviation" (
  "deviation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deviation */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample related to the deviation */,
  "deviation_type" TEXT /* Type of deviation (e.g., missed sample, delayed sample) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the deviation */,
  "date_occurred" TEXT /* Date when the deviation occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deviation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sampling_deviation_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample analyzed */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "date_analyzed" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., pharmacokinetics, efficacy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_analysis_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)
